issue: AR labels intermittently tilt/pitch backward and downward — happens to any marker, not just one
confirmed_facts: Affects any marker, not specific ones
Not the same as the dropping issue — dropping is fixed, this is separate

attempts.what: Yaw-only billboard — lookAt target set to (0, worldY, 0)
attempts.why: Full lookAt(0,0,0) pitches toward camera when marker Y position jitters — yaw-only ignores pitch
attempts.result: Partially helped but tilt still occurs intermittently

attempts.what: Position smoothing in pose-filter — lerp alpha=0.3, seed on first frame, reset on markerLost
attempts.why: Depth spikes from AR.js cause single-frame position jumps which tilt the label — lerp averages them out
attempts.result: Reverted — no visible change, tilt still occurred

attempts.what: Billboard fixed Y — seed lookAt target Y from first detection, never update it
attempts.why: Yaw-only billboard recalculates worldY every frame — depth spike changes worldY, lookAt target shifts, label rotates off-axis and appears to shrink

leading_hypothesis: AR.js position estimate is noisy frame-to-frame — sudden depth/position spikes cause the label to lurch even with yaw-only billboard
next: Position smoothing on marker detected position
